data.title: Why Nvidia, AMD, Micron, Arm And Other Chipmakers Are Ripping Higher Premarket On Thursday
data.description: TSMC is lifting the semiconductor stocks solidly higher, potentially helping the market reclaim record high on Thursday.

data.title: Why TSMC Shares Are Trading Higher By Around 8%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
'Miracle' Weight Loss Drug Ozempic And Similar Drugs Reduce Alcohol And Opioid Overdose, Study Reveals
data.description: Research published in the journal Addiction indicates that GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic may play a crucial role in reducing substance abuse.

data.title: Tesla Inches Closer To Beginning Cybertruck Deliveries In Canada
data.description: Tesla is seemingly nearing delivering its Cybertruck vehicles to customers in Canada, according to a post from Cybertruck lead engineer Wes Morrill.

data.title: Google Urges 9th Circuit To Halt 'Dangerous' Epic Ruling, Cites Substantial New Security Risks
data.description: Google has requested the 9th Circuit Court of Appeals to put a stop to the impending changes mandated by Judge James Donato's ruling in the Epic v. Google case.
